debug_info.goal:
case neg
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ L
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
h₁ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
h₂ : Γ.conj ➝ Γ.conj ⋏ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this✝ : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
this : Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
⊢ False

failed_attempts: apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁

have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      apply mem_omega_of_mem
have hΓ_sub : ↑Γ ⊆ construction_omega T hT := fun _ h => Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨encode φ, hΓ h⟩

have impossible : ∀ k, ∀ (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT k → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory → False := by
      intro k
apply T.imp_closed axiomK
apply monotone_construction (Nat.le_succ _) (hΓ hx)

have consistent : ∀ i, ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i Γ hΓ hC
      induction i generalizing Γ with
      | zero =>
        simp [construction] at hΓ
        have : χ ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction Γ using Finset.induction with
          | empty => simp

suffices ∀ n, ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT n → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory → False by
      exact this (encode φ) Γ hΓ (T.mem_trans h₂ h₁)
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      intro Γ hΓ h
      have : χ ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction Γ using Finset.induction with
        | empty =>
          simp
apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁
apply T.imp_closed axiomK
apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁

let Γ_base := Γ.filter (λ δ => χ ➝ δ ∈ T.theory)
    let Γ_added := Γ.filter (λ δ => χ ➝ δ ∉ T.theory)
    
    by_cases h_added : Γ_added = ∅
    . have : Γ ⊆ Γ_base := by
        intro δ hδ
        by_contra h
        have : δ ∈ Γ_added := Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨hδ, h⟩
        rw [h_added] at this; contradiction
      have : χ ➝ Γ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
        | empty => 
          simp; apply T.imp_closed (φ := ⊤); 
          . exact axiomK; 
          . apply T.mem_of_provable; simp
        | insert δ S ih h_notin =>
          simp;
          have hδ : χ ➝ δ ∈ T.theory := (Finset.mem_filter.mp (this (Finset.mem_insert_self δ S))).2
          have hS : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := ih (λ x hx => this (Finset.mem_insert_of_mem hx))
          apply T.andIR hS hδ
      have : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
        apply T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj) (ψ := ξ) _ ‹Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory›
        -- L ⊢ (Γ ➝ ξ) ➝ (χ ➝ Γ) ➝ (χ ➝ ξ)
        grind
      contradiction
    . obtain ⟨γ, hγ, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image Γ_added encode (by simpa [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] using h_added)
      have h_enc : ∀ δ ∈ Γ_added, encode δ ≤ encode γ := by
        intro δ hδ; apply hmax δ hδ
      
      have h_subset : ↑(Γ.erase γ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode γ) := by
        intro δ hδ
        have hδ_mem : δ ∈ Γ := Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hδ
        by_cases h_base : χ ➝ δ ∈ T.theory
        . apply monotone_construction (zero_le _); exact h_base
        . have h_add : δ ∈ Γ_added := Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨hδ_mem, h_base⟩
          have : encode δ < encode γ := by
            refine lt_of_le_of_ne (h_enc δ h_add) ?_
            intro h_eq
            apply Finset.not_mem_erase γ Γ (h_eq ▸ hδ)
          apply monotone_construction (le_of_lt this)
          -- Since δ ∈ Γ, it is in construction_omega.
          -- If δ is added, it is in construction (encode δ + 1).
          -- construction (encode δ + 1) ⊆ construction (encode γ).
          have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode δ + 1) := by
            -- Elements not in base must be added at their step
            sorry
          apply subset_construction_add
          assumption

      apply not_of_mem_construction_omega h_subset (φ := γ)
      . convert this✝ using 1
        -- Logic: Γ.conj ↔ (Γ \ {γ}).conj ∧ γ
        grind
      . apply hΓ
apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁

by_cases h : ∃ γ ∈ Γ, χ ➝ γ ∉ T.theory
    . obtain ⟨γ, hγ, hnot⟩ := h
      let Γ' := Γ.filter (fun x => χ ➝ x ∉ T.theory)
      have hΓ' : Γ'.Nonempty := ⟨γ, by simpa [Γ']⟩
      obtain ⟨δ, hδ, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image Γ' encode hΓ'
      have hδ_mem : δ ∈ construction_omega T hT := Set.mem_iUnion_of_mem (encode φ) (hΓ (Finset.mem_of_mem_filter hδ))
      have := (of_mem_construction_omega hδ_mem).resolve_left (Finset.mem_filter.mp hδ).2
      apply this (Γ.erase δ)
      . intro x hx
        have hxΓ : x ∈ Γ := Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hx
        by_cases hxT : χ ➝ x ∈ T.theory
        . apply monotone_construction (Nat.zero_le _)
apply construction_omega_not_mem_csq (T := T) (hT := hT)
apply mem_omega_of_mem

let h_cons (i) : ∀ Δ : Finset _, ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      induction i with
      | zero =>
        intro Δ hΔ h
        have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          induction Δ using Finset.induction_on <
have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem <| T.imp_closed (axiomK (φ := φ) (ψ := χ)) (T.L_subset hφ)
apply T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ➝ ξ)
apply not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁
have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁
apply T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ➝ ξ)

have h_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty =>
        apply mem_omega_of_mem

have hΓ_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty =>
        simp
have : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁
apply T.imp_closed axiomK

have hΓ_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty =>
        simp
have h_not_mem : φ ∉ construction_omega T hT := not_of_mem_construction_omega hΓ h₁

have hΓ_conj : Γ.conj ∈ construction_omega T hT := by
      induction Γ using Finset.induction_on with
      | empty =>
        apply mem_omega_of_mem
apply construction_omega_not_mem_csq (T := T) (hT := hT)

have h_in_T := T.mem_trans h₂ h₁
    rcases Γ.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hΓ
    . simp only [Finset.conj_empty] at h_in_T
      have : χ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := T.mem_trans (T.mem_of_provable verum) h_in_T
      contradiction
    . obtain ⟨γ, hγ, hmax⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image Γ encode hΓ
      have hsub : ↑(Γ.erase γ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode γ) := by
        intro δ hδ
have : φ ∈ construction_omega T hT := mem_omega_of_mem <| T.mem_of_provable <| af <| Logic.iff_provable.mpr hφ
